response.title: Chief Operations Officer (COO)
response.description: Retail Innovations Inc. is seeking a dynamic Chief Operations Officer (COO) to drive operational excellence and strategic growth across our retail channels. The successful candidate will collaborate with the executive team to develop and implement strategies that enhance customer experience, optimize operations, and improve profitability. This role requires a visionary leader with a strong background in retail operations and supply chain management.

requirements.education: Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, MBA preferred
